verses.text: Israel-te a ci uh damsak kik ning, ci-in ka ngaihsut ciangin, amau' mawhna leh amau' siatna bekbek kimu thei hi. Amaute in mi khemin, inn luhin na gu uh a, konglak nangawnah mi' na sut uh hi
Amau' gamtatsiatna khempeuh ka phawk lamtak amaute in ngaihsutin neikhalo uh hi. Amau' mawhna in amaute gakcip a, ka muhna mahmahah om gige uh hi
Amaute in a zuaupiteng uh tawh kumpipa lungdamsak uh a, a khemnateng uh tawh a uliante uh nuamsak uh hi
Amaute zuautatin citaklo uh hi. Amaute pen, mohbawlpa in a anlom meek a pawm mateng, moh emna meikhuk sunga a tawhsa, mutloh seemlohin a koih phot mei tawh kibang uh hi
Kumpipa in pawi a bawl ni-in amaute in uliante zu khamsakin haisak uh a, amau' ngimna a theilopi-in kumpipa zong tua lakah hong kihel hi
Tua bangin amau' sawmsimna mei bangin hong kuang hi. Zanthapai-in a hehna uh mei bangin khukhu a, zingsangin mei bangin hong kuangkhia hi
A hehluatna uh tawh amau a ukte a thatlum uh hi. A kumpite uh khat khit khat a banbanin kithat a, ahi zongin kuamah in kei kiangah huhna hong ngenlo uh hi
Israel, a kiima om minam dangte tawh kipawlin tua mite muan'in nei a, a kiheilo moh kiem tawh kibang uh hi
A kipawlpih minam dangte in a thahatnateng uh teeptum a, ahi zongin a kiteeptumlam phawkkhalo uh hi. A lu tung uha om a sam uh a kan'lam nangawn phawkkhalo uh hi
Israel mite' kiphatsakna in amau' langkhatah teci pang hi. Ahi zongin hih thu khempeuhah zong, amau' Topa Pasian ahi kei' lamah hong kihei tuanlo uh a, kei hong zonglo uh hi
Israel pen a khemnop kawl vakhu hai tawh kibang hi. Egypt-te kiangah huhna va ngen masa uh a, tua ciangin Assiria-te kiangah a va tai uh hi
Amaute a va pai laitakun ka ngen tawh amaute ka na siah ding a, vasa mat bangin ka ngen tawh amaute ka man ding hi. Amau' gamtatsiatna hangin gim ka pia ding hi
Amaute in kei hong taisanin hong lehdo uh ahih manin gimna ngahin siatna tuak ding uh hi. Amaute ka hotkhiat nop hangin amaute in kei hong lehgen zawsop uh hi

Amaute in lungsim takpi tawh kei tungah huhna hong ngenlo uh a, dawibia mite bang lelin a gamta uh hi. An leh leenggahzu a nget uh ciangin zong lawkite bangin a ngen uh hi. Amaute in kei hong lehdo uh hi
Amaute khoi-in a thahat mite suaksak napi-in, amaute in kei hong lehsawm zawsop uh hi

Amaute, kei' lam hong ngaloin, Baal pasian' lam nga tawntung uh hi. A khakna ding san a kha theilo thalpeu tel tawh kibang uh hi. Amau' kiphatsak pauna hangun a uliante uh namsau-in si ding uh a, Egypt mite in amaute nuihsan lel ding uh hi.
